project.description: Dad Jack Learns Math CI/CD - learns-math子路径部署

hudson.tasks.Shell.command:
cd /var/www/dad-jack-learns-math
# Clean and pull git checkout . git clean -fd git pull origin main
# Remove old build and rebuild rm -rf .next npm install --legacy-peer-deps npm run build
# Restart PM2 pm2 delete dad-jack-learns-math || true PORT=3003 pm2 start npm --name dad-jack-learns-math -- start
# Verify sleep 3 curl -s -f http://localhost:3003/learns-math > /dev/null && echo "部署成功"
